## What's in this PR?

Describe your changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit / functional tests added or updated
- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpunit` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpstan analyse -c phpstan.neon -l max src/` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/ecs check src tests` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Translation key trees kept in sync (if translations changed)
